findings.message: PII (owner_email) logged directly. The corresponding model field in src/demo/db/models.py explicitly marks owner_email as PII with comment 'do not include in logs or external responses', but log.info() at line 46 includes owner_email=payload.owner_email.
findings.suggestion: Remove owner_email from the log.info() call. If audit logging is required, log only the item_id: log.info("item_created", item_id=item.id)

findings.message: PII (owner_email) collected in ItemCreate schema but not used. The owner_email is accepted from the client but never passed to create_item(), and is only used for logging PII. This represents unnecessary collection of PII.
findings.suggestion: Either remove owner_email from ItemCreate if it's not needed for item creation, or if the field is legitimately needed, store it properly without logging it.
